name: mivia-agentic-engineering
description: Engineering working contracts, bug-audit, and verification skills for reliable agentic software delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Working contracts, bug-audit, and verification workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Apply evidence discipline, risk-based autonomy, minimal implementation, deep bug auditing, review, and scoped verification to software engineering work.
defaultPrompt: Apply the engineering working contract to this coding task.
Verify this code change and report the remaining risk.
Run a deep bug audit across the selected paths and report source-grounded findings.
